headline: How Investors May Respond To Martin Marietta (MLM) Reaffirmed 2026 Outlook And Expansion-Focused Deal Activity
summary: In late April 2026, Martin Marietta Materials reported first-quarter sales of US$1,362 million versus US$1,162 million a year earlier and reaffirmed full-year 2026 revenue guidance of US$7,000 million to US$7,320 million, alongside net earnings from continuing operations guidance of US$1,062 million to US$1,168 million. The quarter also featured completion of the QUIKRETE asset exchange, an agreement to acquire New Frontier Materials, and the appointment of Chris Samborski as Chief Operating...
